summary: Phase 44B: Promotion Center for Affiliates and Sales + Structural Fixes - All tests pass (10/10 backend, 5/5 frontend). Verified admin sidebar has exactly ONE Settings entry, partner portal shows correct role-based navigation, and all new pages load correctly.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Sales: neema.sales@konekt.demo / Sales123!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 44B complete. All structural fixes verified: 1) Admin sidebar has exactly ONE Settings entry (to /admin/settings-hub), no duplicates. 2) Partner portal for distributor type shows product partner nav (Dashboard, My Catalog, Create Listing, Stock Table, Bulk Upload, My Orders, Settlements), NOT affiliate nav. 3) /account/referrals route works and renders ReferralsPage with referral_code, referral_link, stats, history. 4) /staff/promotions loads SalesPromotionCenterPage with product cards showing commission and client savings. 5) /partner/affiliate-promotions loads AffiliatePromotionsPage with promo codes and share links.

backend_account_referrals.evidence: Returns referral_code, referral_link, stats (total_referrals, successful, reward_earned), history

backend_affiliate_products.evidence: Returns products with pricing (404 for non-affiliate partners is expected)

backend_sales_promotions.evidence: Returns promotions data for sales staff

backend_partner_dashboard.evidence: Returns partner with type field (distributor for demo.partner)

frontend_admin_sidebar.evidence: Exactly ONE Settings entry in sidebar (to /admin/settings-hub), no duplicates

frontend_partner_nav_distributor.evidence: Distributor partner sees product partner nav (Dashboard, My Catalog, Create Listing, Stock Table, Bulk Upload, My Orders, Settlements), NOT affiliate nav

frontend_account_referrals.evidence: ReferralsPage component renders with referral code (DEMO.CUSE6CF), referral link, stats KPIs, copy buttons

frontend_staff_promotions.evidence: SalesPromotionCenterPage loads with product cards showing Your Commission, Client Saves, Copy Link, Suggested captions

frontend_affiliate_promotions.evidence: AffiliatePromotionsPage loads with product cards showing You Earn, Customer Saves, promo code, share link, Ready-to-post captions
